name: Trust Intelligence MCP Server (Entity Verification & Sanctions)
what_it_does: MCP server for entity verification, sanctions screening, and trust scoring for AI agents. Enables agents to check entities (individuals, companies) against sanctions lists, verify business legitimacy, and generate trust scores for risk assessment in financial and compliance workflows — supporting KYC/AML (Know Your Customer / Anti-Money Laundering) processes.
use_cases: Screening counterparties against sanctions lists from compliance agents
Entity verification and trust scoring for KYC workflows from fintech agents
Anti-money laundering (AML) risk assessment from financial compliance agents
Vendor/partner due diligence automation from procurement compliance agents
not_for: Personal credit scoring (entity verification focus, not consumer credit)
Definitive legal compliance determinations — always require human compliance review
Real-time high-frequency transaction screening (designed for agent workflow integration)
best_when: A compliance or fintech agent needs to screen entities against sanctions lists and assess trust scores for KYC/AML workflows — automating a step that traditionally requires manual compliance officer review.
avoid_when: You need certified compliance system with regulatory audit trail. AI-assisted screening is a tool — regulated financial institutions require qualified compliance officers for final determinations.

auth.notes: API key required for the LimitGuard AI service. Sign up at limitguard.ai for access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier available; check limitguard.ai for current limits
pricing.notes: Startup compliance service. Pricing evolving — check current pricing before production deployment.

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Sanctions screening has serious legal implications — false negatives can result in regulatory fines
AI screening tools are not a substitute for certified compliance systems with regulatory audit trails
Startup service (JWconsultancy1234/limitguard-ai) — verify sanctions list coverage and update frequency
Entity data submitted for screening is privacy-sensitive — review data retention policies
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Sanctions/KYC compliance. Entity data is sensitive. HTTPS. API key auth. Startup — verify regulatory compliance of the screening data before production AML/KYC use.

security_score_components.security_notes: Sensitive entity/compliance data. FINANCIAL RISK context. API key auth. Verify sanctions list quality before regulatory-facing use.
